products.name: Milk
products.description: Milk products are highly nutritious, offering a dense source of calcium, complete proteins, and vitamin D essential for bone health and muscle repair. However, their impact on health depends on individual tolerance, the type of product consumed, and overall dietary balance

products.name: Chicken -1kg
products.description: Fresh, farm-raised chicken available for daily delivery!.100% Halal and hygienically processed. Antibiotic-free & chemical-free. Whole birds, boneless breasts, and leg cuts available

products.description: Good healthy product produced by directly farm

products.name: Organic Almonds
products.description: Premium quality organic almonds in a re-sealable pouch.

products.name: Fresh Strawberries

products.name: Whole Wheat Bread
products.description: Soft and healthy whole wheat bread baked fresh daily.
